infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Lazynext uses the camera to record video clips for your editing projects.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Lazynext uses the microphone to capture audio with your video recordings.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Lazynext saves recorded clips to your photo library and imports media for editing.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Lazynext needs write access to save recorded video clips to your photo library.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Lazynext to access your camera for video recording.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Lazynext to access your photos for importing media.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Lazynext to save recorded clips to your photo library.
